user_system_path: SCOUT seam (#486) opened 2026-06-20 by owner mandate. Build the additive, flag-gated proactive Scout lane (Drive-as-searchable-brain + real web access + opportunity discovery) without touching the always-on Workday Presence default. Stage 0: governance unblock + feature flags + embeddings schema (no behavior change, all flags off, migration not yet applied).
allowed_files_raw: SCOUT seam #486: scout engine (lib/scout/**), shared Drive extractor + crawl (lib/sync/**), researcher web-access swap, generator writer reuse, scout cron routes, embeddings schema (supabase/migrations/**), feature flags (lib/config/prelaunch-spend.ts), deps (package.json), and Scout docs. Control-plane + Bible governance edits permitted.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard or visual redesign, no components/** changes, no Stripe, no secrets/.env. Scout proposes review-gated artifacts only — never auto-send.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npm run build
required_browser_proof: N/A for Stage 0 (no behavior change; all SCOUT_* flags off, migration not applied). Live/product proof is owner-gated and deferred to Stage 1+.
acceptance_condition: Stage 0: SCOUT seam open and consistent across control plane; additive Bible Part V; feature flags default-off; embeddings migration committed (not applied); gate:continuity + typecheck + build green; zero behavior change with flags off.
anti_regression_checks: Workday Presence pipeline unchanged with all SCOUT_* flags off
no auto-send / no new outbound path introduced
no forbidden public-facing claim terms in app/components/public
stop_condition: Stage 0 lands as a draft PR for owner review. Owner-gated next steps before Stage 1+: authorize VOYAGE_API_KEY, apply the migration to production Supabase, and approve any paid validation cycle.
next_command: Owner: review the Stage 0 draft PR, then authorize the Voyage key + production migration apply so Stage 1 (Drive full-index + retrieval) can proceed.
